name: Creamy Salmon Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon.
2. Combine the juice, onion, vegetable stock, and white wine in a bowl.
3. Cook on HIGH POWER for 10 minutes.
4. Stand for 15 minutes before proceeding.
5. Melt butter on HIGH POWER for 30 seconds.
6. Stir in flour and cook for 30 seconds on HIGH POWER.
7. Add milk (150 ml / 1/4 pint) to the mixture at a time, whisking well after each addition until cooked for 1 minute.
8. Mix in the stock, salmon, cheese, and yogurt. Season to taste.
9. Transfer the soup to a blender and puree until smooth.
10. Reheat on MEDIUM POWER for 7 minutes before serving.
11. Serves 4-6. Approx. 280 kcals per serving.
